element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Establishes spatial orientation and player positioning from 30-degree overhead view
Core offensive mechanic for creating separation and executing plays
Strategic team composition decisions affect on-court performance

element_introduction_order.element: Multiple play modes (single-player, multiplayer, coach/GM roles)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players can engage at different strategic depths from player control to management

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Real-time basketball simulation pacing—organic flow of gameplay punctuated by natural basketball stoppages (fouls, out-of-bounds, timeouts)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory difficulty with basic defensive AI and predictable offensive patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Opponent adaptation increases; multi-dimensional play-calling required
difficulty_curve.late_game: Championship-level opponents with sophisticated strategy and execution

notable_level_patterns.description: Sequential games building toward playoff qualification; gradual opponent difficulty increase
Best-of-7 series structure with escalating stakes and opponent quality
Player can engage as individual player, coach, or general manager—each presents different strategic layers and pacing
